# PoundSterling

## Tags
currency, money, payment

## Categories
finance

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/pound-sterling)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::PoundSterling;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        PoundSterling { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
